creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The mouse that caused the problem has "horizontal" (left/right) wheel. Replacing the mouse with the one without the wheel makes the problem go away.

I suspect that this commit to ums.c caused the problem:

> ------------------------------------------------------------------------
> r305828 | hselasky | 2016-09-15 01:34:16 -0700 (Thu, 15 Sep 2016) | 7 lines
> 
> MFC r305590:
> Correctly map the USB mouse tilt delta values into buttons 5 and 6
> instead of 3 and 4 which is used for the scroll wheel, according to
> X.org.
> 
> PR:             170358
> 
> ------------------------------------------------------------------------
